creator: dereks@lifeofadishwasher.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)

This is a rolling release that's not versioned or a changelog kept outside of git's version history.  The upstream claim is if it's in the git repo it's stable.

The best we could do is review the previous commit to the updated from https://git.tt-rss.org/fox/tt-rss/commits/master  or a full listing of the commits can be provided.  Gog (git.tt-rss.org) does not appear to have a good way to isolate a range of commits.
